input: The error message reads quote your session has expired due to inactivity. end quote
ideal: The error message reads "your session has expired due to inactivity."

input: His final words were quote I have no regrets end quote.
ideal: His final words were "I have no regrets".

input: She described the proposal as quote ambitious but fundamentally flawed end quote and urged us to reconsider.
ideal: She described the proposal as "ambitious but fundamentally flawed" and urged us to reconsider.

input: The contract states quote payment terms are net 30 days from invoice date. end quote Please review carefully.
ideal: The contract states "payment terms are net 30 days from invoice date." Please review carefully.

input: He likes to say quote move fast and break things end quote.
ideal: He likes to say "move fast and break things".

input: The review was scathing, calling the product quote an overpriced paperweight that fails at its one job end quote before listing numerous defects.
ideal: The review was scathing, calling the product "an overpriced paperweight that fails at its one job" before listing numerous defects.

input: The safety manual warns quote never disable the emergency stop mechanism. end quote
ideal: The safety manual warns "never disable the emergency stop mechanism."

input: She signed the email with quote forever in your debt end quote.

input: He was like quote you know I never said that end quote and then, you know, stormed out of the room.
ideal: He was like "you know I never said that" and then, you know, stormed out of the room.

input: The architect insisted on quote form follows function end quote as the guiding principle.
ideal: The architect insisted on "form follows function" as the guiding principle.

input: She whispered quote I don't think we should be here end quote before pulling me into the shadows.
ideal: She whispered "I don't think we should be here" before pulling me into the shadows.

input: The contract specifies quote payment terms are net thirty days from invoice date end quote.

input: He was like quote you know the system is fundamentally broken end quote and honestly, I couldn't argue.
ideal: He was like "you know the system is fundamentally broken" and honestly, I couldn't argue.

input: The museum plaque reads quote donated by the estate of Eleanor Whitmore, 1987. end quote
ideal: The museum plaque reads "donated by the estate of Eleanor Whitmore, 1987."

input: My grandmother's favorite saying was quote measure twice, cut once end quote.
ideal: My grandmother's favorite saying was "measure twice, cut once".

ideal: She ended her presentation with "the only way out is through."

ideal: The error log shows "failed to establish secure connection due to certificate mismatch."

ideal: She described the meeting as "productive but inconclusive." I think that's corporate speak for wasted time.

ideal: The ancient inscription translates roughly to "those who seek shall find, but those who demand shall be denied".

ideal: He opened with "let me be perfectly clear" and then proceeded to contradict himself three times.

ideal: The so-called guarantee states "we will make it right or your money back." Sounds good until you read the fine print.
